description: Eighth curated wave of keep-side rules promoted from explicit official compatibility pages and local metadata checks.

rules.reason: Official compatibility pages and bundled loader metadata both describe Create Crafts & Additions as a client-and-server Create addon.
rules.notes: Promoted after checking Modrinth compatibility plus the bundled Fabric and Forge descriptors inside the jar used by Prominence II.

rules.reason: Official mod pages mark Immersive Lanterns as client-and-server, and the bundled descriptors keep only optional client-side lighting integrations.
rules.notes: Added for the cross-platform bundled jar variant that currently normalizes to the NeoForge subject in Medieval MC.

rules.reason: Official release metadata marks Tide as required on both sides, and the bundled loader descriptors use BOTH-side dependencies throughout.
rules.notes: Promoted from the current Medieval MC review case after checking both Modrinth release metadata and local bundled descriptors.

rules.reason: Official datapack pages explicitly state that Wabi-Sabi Structures can be installed server-side only, and local loader metadata shows a resource-loader datapack wrapper.
rules.notes: Kept as a Quilt subject because the current parser normalizes this Fabric/Quilt wrapper to the Quilt loader variant.

rules.reason: Local metadata identifies the jar as a Fabric resource-loader datapack with no code entrypoints beyond pack loading.
rules.notes: Promoted from needs-curated-review after manual verification of the embedded fabric.mod.json.

rules.reason: Local metadata identifies the jar as a Fabric resource-loader datapack with no code entrypoints beyond pack loading.
rules.notes: Promoted from needs-curated-review after manual verification of the embedded fabric.mod.json.
